sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65774" key="melagko/mhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελαγ-κόμης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n65774.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">black-haired</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
